what_happened: Added security audit comments to GitHub Actions workflow files documenting that secrets are scoped to the step or job level
why: Task required documenting an existing security posture (no workflow-level env: blocks containing secrets) as inline comments for future maintainers
fix_applied: Added a single comment line immediately before the `jobs:` keyword in each of the six affected workflows
pattern_to_remember: When workflows have a top-level `env:` block for non-secret values (NODE_VERSION, ECR_REPOSITORY, etc.) but all `secrets.*` references appear only inside step-level `env:` blocks, place the security comment between the top-level `env:` block and `jobs:`. For workflows with no top-level `env:`, place it directly before `jobs:`.
